prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (C₄H₄O, 9 atoms) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz; single-point calculation (no re-optimization at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed. HOMO = -6.3597638 eV (index 17), LUMO = -0.1024036 eV (index 18). Headline result: HOMO-LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV. Koopmans-derived descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3598 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024 eV, electronegativity = 3.2311 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1287 eV, softness = 0.3196 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity = 1.6684 eV. Total electronic energy = -230.11429 Hartree (-6261.7289 eV), gas-phase electronic energy, not comparable across methods.
